nodes.label: AI as collaborative drafting and editing tool
nodes.grounding_span: I collaborate with it throughout the process, and often will draft it myself and then see what AI comes up with

nodes.label: AI reliability in legal research and case law
nodes.grounding_span: I don't have a lot of confidence with AI performing legal research and case law analysis at this time

nodes.label: AI as efficiency improver in legal practice
nodes.label_negative: AI as source of inaccuracy and risk
nodes.grounding_span: we are all trying to find ways that we can incorporate AI into our practice to improve efficiency

nodes.label: Human irreplaceability in litigation
nodes.label_negative: AI replacement of human lawyer in litigation
nodes.grounding_span: it cannot replace the human element required to represent an injured client and take their case all the way to trial

nodes.label: Professional competence and accuracy
